description: Style NoteCelebration of Happiness is a part of hugo boss' Orange range. The face of this fragrance is Sienna Miller and is perfect for this season as it is inspired by the happiness of the spring. Product DetailsThe dominant accords in this perfume are sweet apple, peach, white flowers, orange blossom, plum, cinnamon, sandalwood, vanilla and olive woodCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
